mapper.insert: insert into sys_audit_access ( id, trace_id, user_id, username, request_method, request_path, resource_code, access_result, deny_reason, client_ip, user_agent, request_time, response_time_ms, status, remark, create_by ) values ( #{id}, #{traceId}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestPath}, #{resourceCode}, #{accessResult}, #{denyReason}, #{clientIp}, #{userAgent}, #{requestTime}, #{responseTimeMs}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy} )

insert into sys_audit_access_detail (id, audit_id, request_body, request_params, response_body, operation_summary, status, remark, create_by) values (#{id}, #{auditId}, #{requestBody}, #{requestParams}, #{responseBody}, #{operationSummary}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy})
mapper.select: select a.id, a.trace_id as "traceId", a.user_id as "userId", a.username, a.request_method as "requestMethod", a.request_path as "requestPath", a.resource_code as "resourceCode", a.access_result as "accessResult", a.deny_reason as "denyReason", a.client_ip as "clientIp", a.request_time as "requestTime", a.response_time_ms as "responseTimeMs", a.status, a.remark, a.create_by as "createBy", a.create_time as "createTime", d.operation_summary as "operationSummary", d.request_params as "requestParams", d.request_body as "requestBody", d.response_body as "responseBody" from sys_audit_access a left join sys_audit_access_detail d on d.audit_id = a.id order by a.request_time desc limit #{limit}
